creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sat Jan  4 08:24:55 2014
New Revision: 338630
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/338630

Log:
  - Add pecl-leveldb 0.1.4
  
  This extension is a PHP binding for Google LevelDB
  
  WWW: http://pecl.php.net/package/leveldb
  
  PR:		ports/185233
  Submitted by:	John Chen <johnpupu@gmail.com>

Added:
  head/databases/pecl-leveldb/
  head/databases/pecl-leveldb/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/databases/pecl-leveldb/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/databases/pecl-leveldb/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/databases/Makefile

Modified: head/databases/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/Makefile	Sat Jan  4 08:24:48 2014	(r338629)
+++ head/databases/Makefile	Sat Jan  4 08:24:55 2014	(r338630)
@@ -537,6 +537,7 @@
     SUBDIR += pecl-dbase
     SUBDIR += pecl-drizzle
     SUBDIR += pecl-handlersocket
+    SUBDIR += pecl-leveldb
     SUBDIR += pecl-mdbtools
     SUBDIR += pecl-memcache
     SUBDIR += pecl-memcached

Added: head/databases/pecl-leveldb/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/databases/pecl-leveldb/Makefile	Sat Jan  4 08:24:55 2014	(r338630)
@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+# Created by: johnpupu <johnpupu@gmail.com>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	leveldb
+PORTVERSION=	0.1.4
+CATEGORIES=	databases
+MASTER_SITES=	http://pecl.php.net/get/
+PKGNAMEPREFIX=	pecl-
+EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tgz
+DIST_SUBDIR=	PECL
+
+MAINTAINER=	johnpupu@gmail.com
+COMMENT=	This extension is a PHP binding for Google LevelDB
+
+LICENSE=	PHP301
+
+LIB_DEPENDS=	libleveldb.so:${PORTSDIR}/databases/leveldb
+
+USE_PHP=	yes
+USE_PHP_BUILD=	yes
+USE_PHPEXT=	yes
+USE_PHPIZE=	yes
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/databases/pecl-leveldb/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/databases/pecl-leveldb/distinfo	Sat Jan  4 08:24:55 2014	(r338630)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (PECL/leveldb-0.1.4.tgz) = b0d2485e7f1353a794cd58bbaf331154723cda98ae41757f1167e1661bd78eef
+SIZE (PECL/leveldb-0.1.4.tgz) = 17726

Added: head/databases/pecl-leveldb/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/databases/pecl-leveldb/pkg-descr	Sat Jan  4 08:24:55 2014	(r338630)
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+This extension is a PHP binding for Google LevelDB
+
+WWW: http://pecl.php.net/package/leveldb
